title: ursinia coronopifolia
intro: Ursinia coronopifolia, also known as the yellow daisy or bush daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the fynbos biome of the Western Cape province in South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ursinia coronopifolia are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to address a range of health issues, from digestive problems to skin conditions.
